title: ARTST Baby Doll Bed Set- Portable Bassinet for Dolls up to 53 cm - Handbag for Girl - Includes Blanket, Mattress, Quilt
features: 3-in-1 Convertible Doll Sleeping Solution: This versatile dolls cot transforms into multiple sleeping arrangements: a comfortable baby doll bed, portable bassinet, and charming dolls moses basket. The magical unicorn design with rainbow accents creates the perfect sleeping environment for reborn dolls accessories and standard 18-22 inch dolls, providing various baby doll bed options for different play scenarios and display purposes.

Universal Size Fits Most 18-22 Inch Dolls: Designed to accommodate most popular doll sizes, this spacious baby doll crib functions as both a baby doll bassinet and practical cot for dolls. The generous interior comfortably holds various doll types while providing ample space for baby doll accessories. Perfect for dolls cots and cribs collections and compatible with most doll accessories available on the market.

Premium Child-Safe Materials & Easy Maintenance: Crafted from superior hypoallergenic materials meeting UK safety standards, this dolls bed features wipe-clean surfaces that maintain their vibrant unicorn patterns. The durable doll cot construction ensures long-lasting performance for daily play, while the plush blanket adds extra comfort and warmth for dolls during nap time scenarios.

Complete Doll Nursery Set with Accessories: This comprehensive set includes the unicorn-themed dolls cot plus matching cloud-soft blanket, creating the ultimate baby doll accessories collection. Perfect for reborn baby dolls accessories and nurturing play, it enhances any doll accessories collection while inspiring imaginative childcare scenarios and realistic doll care routines in bedroom displays.

Professional Nursery Display & Storage Solution: Offering multiple functions as dolls beds and cots for naptime arrangements and dolls moses basket for decorative display. The elegant design makes it ideal for doll cots and cribs collections, providing everything needed for complete doll nursery setups while serving as practical storage for baby doll stuff and accessories.
